rationale: The US-Iran ceasefire continuation and imminent peace deal signing maintain indirect energy price relief for Portugal; no new qualitative developments affecting Portugal this cycle.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; peace deal signing Friday
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal moves toward formal signing — a small incremental step. Energy cost relief for Portugal's economy and tourism sector persists but no new qualitative shift from last cycle.

top_events.title: Stock markets soar, oil falls as US-Iran deal confirmed
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices and rising markets provide continued indirect benefit for Portugal's cost of living and tourism economy — continuation of last cycle's trend.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in Cártama, Spain injured 17 people — a minor incident in neighboring Iberia with negligible impact on Portuguese daily life.
